DataOutputStream.java

00037 
00038 package java.io;
00039 
00040 import java.lang.Float;
00041 import java.lang.Double;
00042 
00051 public class DataOutputStream extends OutputStream implements DataOutput
00052 {
00056     protected OutputStream out;
00057 
00065     public DataOutputStream(OutputStream out)
00066     {
00067         this.out = out;
00068     }
00069 
00078     public synchronized void write(int value) throws IOException
00079     {
00080         out.write(value);
00081     }
00082 
00091     public synchronized void write(byte[] buf)
00092         throws IOException
00093     {
00094         write(buf, 0, buf.length);
00095     }
00096 
00108     public synchronized void write(byte[] buf, int offset, int len) 
00109         throws IOException
00110     {
00111         out.write(buf, offset, len);
00112     }
00113 
00119     public void flush() throws IOException
00120     {
00121         out.flush();
00122     }
00123 
00129     public void close() throws IOException
00130     {
00131         out.close();
00132     }
00133 
00149     public final void writeBoolean(boolean value) throws IOException
00150     {
00151         out.write(value ? 1 : 0);
00152     }
00153 
00170     public final void writeByte(int value) throws IOException
00171     {
00172         out.write(value & 0xff);
00173     }
00174 
00196     public final synchronized void writeShort(int value) throws IOException
00197     {
00198         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value >> 8)));
00199         out.write((byte) (0xff & value));
00200     }
00201 
00222     public final synchronized void writeChar(int value) throws IOException
00223     {
00224         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value >> 8)));
00225         out.write((byte) (0xff & value));
00226     }
00227 
00248     public final synchronized void writeInt(int value) throws IOException
00249     {
00250         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value >> 24)));
00251         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value >> 16)));
00252         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value >>  8)));
00253         out.write((byte) (0xff & value));
00254     }
00255 
00280     public final synchronized void writeLong(long value) throws IOException
00281     {
00282         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value >> 56)));
00283         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value>> 48)));
00284         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value>> 40)));
00285         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value>> 32)));
00286         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value>> 24)));
00287         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value>> 16)));
00288         out.write((byte) (0xff & (value>>  8)));
00289         out.write((byte) (0xff & value));
00290     }
00291 
00311     public final void writeFloat(float value) throws IOException
00312     {
00313         writeInt(Float.floatToIntBits (value));
00314     }
00315 
00335     public final void writeDouble(double value) throws IOException
00336     {
00337         writeLong(Double.doubleToLongBits (value));
00338     }
00339 
00350     public final void writeChars(String value) throws IOException
00351     {
00352         int len = value.length();
00353     
00354         for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i)
00355             writeChar (value.charAt(i));
00356     }
00357 
00390     public final synchronized void writeUTF(String value) throws IOException
00391     {
00392         int len = value.length();
00393         int sum = 0;
00394 
00395         for (int i = 0; i < len && sum <= 65535; ++i)
00396         {
00397             char c = value.charAt(i);
00398             
00399             if (c >= '\u0001' && c <= '\u007f')
00400                 sum += 1;
00401             else if (c == '\u0000' || (c >= '\u0080' && c <= '\u07ff'))
00402                 sum += 2;
00403             else
00404                 sum += 3;
00405         }
00406 
00407         if (sum > 65535)
00408             throw new UTFDataFormatException();
00409 
00410         int pos = 0;
00411         byte[] buf = new byte[sum];
00412 
00413         for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i)
00414         {
00415             char c = value.charAt(i);
00416             
00417             if (c >= '\u0001' && c <= '\u007f')
00418                 buf[pos++] = (byte) c;
00419             else if (c == '\u0000' || (c >= '\u0080' && c <= '\u07ff'))
00420             {
00421                 buf[pos++] = (byte) (0xc0 | (0x1f & (c >> 6)));
00422                 buf[pos++] = (byte) (0x80 | (0x3f & c));
00423             }
00424             else
00425             {
00426                 // JSL says the first byte should be or'd with 0xc0, but
00427                 // that is a typo.  Unicode says 0xe0, and that is what is
00428                 // consistent with DataInputStream.
00429                 buf[pos++] = (byte) (0xe0 | (0x0f & (c >> 12)));
00430                 buf[pos++] = (byte) (0x80 | (0x3f & (c >> 6)));
00431                 buf[pos++] = (byte) (0x80 | (0x3f & c));
00432             }
00433         }
00434     
00435         writeShort(sum);
00436         write(buf, 0, sum);
00437     }
00438 } // class DataOutputStream
00439
